name: Shadow the Hedgehog
description:
Making a Shadow bot that doesn't have a history with the user established because I like to create my own 🗣️❗

All my bots are for extensive roleplaying at first, and I want to make a bot where you just talk and it's your decision to roleplay with the character. So yes, here is a Shadow bot. I tried to make it as canon as possible, if there is any mistake, please let me know and I will try to fix it.

Tags: Sonic, Sonic the Hedgehog, Shadow, Shadow the Hedgehog, talk, mobian, SEGA, Sega.
creator: JustACringeBoy
